summary: Global D2D connections recorded by Ookla jumped 24.5% from July 2025 to March 2026, but a small percentage of overall mobile users have linked their smartphones to a satellite.

title: India's smartphone shipments fell 5% in 1Q26 – Omdia
summary: Demand was pressured by macro headwinds, including rupee depreciation and rising inflation weighing on affordability and delayed consumer upgrades. #pressrelease

title: Truvista scoops up municipal network
summary: Truvista Fiber has cut a deal to acquire the municipal network of Commerce, Georgia. Upon closing, the network will rebrand as Truvista. #pressrelease

title: TDS Telecom deals for Granite State Communications
summary: TDS Telecom has signed a deal to acquire Granite State Communications that will expand TDS's footprint by about 11,000 fiber locations in New Hampshire. #pressrelease

title: Adtran details the router that received FCC's condition approval
summary: Adtran said its SDG router portfolio received conditional approval soon after the agency announced a ban on all new foreign-made routers. #pressrelease

title: Small operator sets sights on Full Duplex DOCSIS
summary: Comcast is Full Duplex (FDX) DOCSIS' champion. However, WinDBreak Cable, a small operator based in Nebraska, recently tested FDX at CableLabs and remains interested in deploying it.

title: Globe Telecom faces major transition as board chairman steps down
summary: After 30 years at the helm, business tycoon Jaime Augusto Zobel de Ayala is stepping down as chairman of Globe Telecom.

summary: Unpaid bills to the three telcos ballooned 31% last year.

title: Vyve Broadband names co-presidents amid Cable One deal
summary: Vyve Broadband has appointed COO Melanie Hannasch and SVP of Engineering Guy McCormick as co-presidents following the recent departure of Andy Parrott. Cable One is nearing a deal to acquire more of Mega Broadband, Vyve's owner. #pressrelease

title: John Ternus to succeed Tim Cook as Apple CEO
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook said he will step aside and become executive chairman. John Ternus, SVP of hardware engineering, will become CEO effective September 1, 2026. #pressrelease

title: ACA Connects ups Tomeika Slappy to director of operations
summary: ACA Connects said it Tomeika Slappy has been promoted to director of operations. Slappy joined the organization in 2016. #pressrelease

title: Broadband permitting bill delights industry, dismays local governments
summary: Telecom industry associations are urging Congress to pass a House bill to reform broadband permitting processes, but groups representing local governments and communities are actively opposing the measure.

title: AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird 7 satellite will be de-orbited after faulty launch
summary: AST SpaceMobile said the BlueBird 7 satellite, launched on a New Glenn rocket, will de-orbit after it was placed into a lower-than-planned orbit. Insurance will cover the loss. #pressrelease

title: Telecom connectivity revenues climbed in Q4 2025 – Omdia
summary: Mobile and fixed broadband and voice services pulled in $333 billion in Q4 2025, up 5%, with 5G surpassing 3 billion connections. #pressrelease
